title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 05 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 05 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 05 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 05/07/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 0.073 % today, the main contract closed at 828.The traders' willingness to ship is less.The steel mills are active to purchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is general. PBF at Shandong port deal 865- 867 yuan/mt.
